Edition VII
Scottsdale, AZ  ·  Summer 2025

Two days with people
who get it.

The MatCap Founder House is a free, invite-only retreat for MatCap portfolio founders. Two days in Scottsdale — side-by-side with a curated group of peers who are building generation companies.

Free for portfolio founders 7th Edition 2 Days Scottsdale, AZ
What it is

Two days.
No fluff.

No panels. No pitch competitions. No firm agenda. Just two days in a Scottsdale house with a small, curated group of MatCap portfolio founders. There are VIPs dropping by to hang out — and if you need to work, work.

🏡
Live together, build together
Founders stay at the house for the two days. The vibe is intentionally loose — work when you want, connect when it feels right, decompress by the pool when you need it.
🎯
Completely free
If you're a MatCap portfolio company, your spot costs you nothing. The house, meals, and the community event are all covered. Just show up.
🤝
A curated peer group
Everyone in the house is building something interesting. Get to know the group — they wouldn't be in the portfolio if they weren't top tier in their own domain.
⚡
No agenda
There's no schedule to follow and nothing mandatory. The best things that happen at the house are never planned — they show up on their own.
The house

Scottsdale done right.

Every edition we find a house that matches the energy — premium, spacious, and built so you can actually work and actually unwind.

🏊

Pool & outdoor space

Every house has a pool. Half the real conversations happen out there.

💻

Work-ready

Fast wifi, multiple zones inside and out. Actually work and actually unwind — both are on the table.

🛏

Private rooms

Everyone gets their own space. You're never far from the group, but quiet is always an option.

🍽

Meals covered

Sponsored lunches and dinners throughout. No logistics, no planning — just show up.

📍

Scottsdale, AZ

Sun, space, zero distractions. Close enough to the city, far enough from the noise.

Community event

Meet the people
who move things here.

During the retreat, we host an invite-only gathering at a nearby venue — bringing together a curated slice of the Arizona startup ecosystem so founders can make genuine connections with the people who matter most in the community.

Invite only

The guest list is curated — not open to the public. Every person in the room is there intentionally.

Nearby venue

Held at a larger venue close to the house, so the energy scales without losing the intimacy of the retreat.

Who shows up

Investors, operators, exited founders, and community builders from across Arizona and beyond. Every person in the room is there for a reason.

No forced networking

No name-tag speed rounds. Just good people in a room together. The connections happen naturally.

Voices from past editions

Six editions.
Real founders. Real words.

"It's a really interesting, curated group of other founders who are in a variety of verticals — all passionate and smart and working on things. They gave me some great constructive criticism as well as support about what I'm doing, and I was able to do the same for them. That feels really good."

ST
Steven

"One of my favorite memories of the entire thing is just the variety of founders Mat was able to bring to the house. All sorts of industries. We shared stories, talked about our businesses, our troubles, helped each other work through problems. A very enlightening experience."

RY
Ryan

"I had a great time. Thank you for the pitch deck help and for the great programming, great people, and a ton of fun."

CA
Cameron

"Connecting with them as well as folks who genuinely care about helping out early stage founders was very helpful — and reassuring."

ME
Meredith
Past residents have been backed by:  Hustle Fund  ·  Outlander VC  ·  Untapped Capital  ·  Draper Associates  ·  Tucker Seed Fund  ·  and many more.
Who can attend

MatCap portfolio only.

The Founder House is exclusively for founders in the MatCap portfolio. It's how we keep the group tight, the conversations honest, and the trust high.

01
MatCap portfolio company
You need to be an active founder in a company MatCap has invested in.
$0
Completely free
House, meals, and the community event — all covered. No cost to residents.
03
Reach out to Mat
In the portfolio and want in? Shoot Mat a message directly at mat@matcap.vc.
